title: The Straw Hats Escape — Closing Beat
description: Dressrosa’s allies protect Luffy as the crew runs toward departure.
scene: On pages 16–16, Luffy, Dressrosa Citizens, Trafalgar Law, Rebecca, King Riku deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: ruins of forest town carta entrance to the eastern port

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Trafatgar Law also up and dis- appeared!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What are those two bosses doing anyway!? Sheesh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I just had to open my big fat mouth!! Here comes one right now! It...it's FUITORA! Luffy-Senpal get your ass over here now!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
